title: Dashboard Gantt Widget View

posts.author: max.shikhman (Max Shikhman)
posts.cookedHtml:
If I create a dashboard and add multiple boards to my Gantt view, is there a way to just show a consolidated timeline for each board? In other words, if each board has multiple groups, can I consolidate all groups into a single timeline and show it on the dashboard. Today the dashboard gantt view shows all groups for all connected boards.

The purpose would be a at-a-glance view across all projects.
